title: WorldState
description: The authoritative, mutable, PERSISTENT instance of a running world (a save). The engine owns this; the LLM only proposes deltas (turn_output) which the engine validates and applies. STABILITY GUARANTEE: once a world is instantiated, its map, entities, stats, and facts persist unchanged unless a validated delta changes them — until the user saves or starts a new world. The materialized map is reused verbatim from here each turn so places stay stable instead of being re-described. A fixed `seed` makes any randomness reproducible.

blueprint_id.description: Id of the immutable blueprint it was instantiated from.

seed.description: RNG seed fixed at instantiation, for reproducible stability.

stats.description: Current quality values keyed by name/id (resilience, progress, and axes from the blueprint).

map.description: Materialized, STABLE places keyed by place id. Grows as the player explores; existing entries are never silently rewritten.

entities.description: Materialized NPCs/objects keyed by id (an NPC may carry a persona blueprint id for persona-in-world).

flags.description: Boolean/scalar world flags set by deltas.

facts.description: The fact ledger: established facts appended via `fact` deltas, used to validate contradictions (drift control).

ending.description: Id of the emergent ending that fired (from blueprint.stakes.endings), or null while ongoing.

description.description: The established description; reused verbatim so the place is stable.

persona_id.description: Optional: persona blueprint id, for an NPC = persona-in-world.

location.description: Place id where it currently is.
